case_title: KEVIN OH VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-12-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN OH IS PRESENT BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OH, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2021 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE IS PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF KEVIN OH IS PRESENT BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, REPRESENTED BY JESUS PONCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OH, KEVIN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
